channel.title: HackerNews 日本語まとめ & AI要約
channel.description: HackerNewsのトップ記事を毎日日本語翻訳・AI要約して配信

item.title: 2026年4月28日（23:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 Microsoft and OpenAI end their exclusive and revenue-sharing deal #2 "Why not just use Lean?" #3 Show HN: OSS Agent I built topped the TerminalBench on Gemini-3-flash-preview #4 Pgbackrest is no longer being maintained #5 4TB of voice samples just stolen from 40k AI contractors at Mercor #6 Fully Featured Audio DSP Firmware for the Raspberry Pi Pico #7 Running Local LLMs Offline on a Ten-Hour Flight #8 Tendril – a self-extending agent that builds and registers its own tools #9 Apple is dropping AFP/TimeCapsule support in macOS 27 #10 Men who stare at walls
